metadata.title: BizMate — AI partner for NZ Chinese business owners
metadata.description: Virtual COO: tax, compliance, hiring, flights, and local life tools.

common.freePhase: All features free for the first 6 months

HomePage.headline: BizMate — AI business partner for Chinese owners in New Zealand
HomePage.tagline: Virtual COO: save people, time, and money for owners; make life easier for the Chinese community in NZ.
HomePage.positioningPaid: Paid tier: business assistant for Chinese owners (SaaS, NZD $49–149/mo)
HomePage.positioningFree: Free tier: lifestyle assistant and acquisition engine
HomePage.localeHint: Chinese is default; use /en for English

landing.metaTitle: BizMate — AI Business Partner for NZ Chinese Entrepreneurs
landing.metaDescription: Tax compliance, AI chat, lifestyle tools — all in one. Free for the first 6 months.
landing.headline:
AI Business Partner for
NZ Chinese Entrepreneurs
landing.subheadline: Tax Compliance · AI Chat · Lifestyle Tools, All in One
landing.freeBadge: All features free for the first 6 months
landing.ctaLogin: Already have an account? Sign in
landing.pain_labor_desc: NZ minimum wage is $23.15/hr plus KiwiSaver and ACC. Hiring is costly. Let AI share the load.
landing.pain_tax_desc: GST, PAYE, KiwiSaver, compliance deadlines — rules change every year. Our rules engine does the maths.
landing.pain_scattered_desc: Finding a GP, checking flights, hiring, compliance calendar — ten websites for ten tasks. One platform for all.
landing.featuresSubtitle: Business tools + lifestyle convenience, designed for NZ Chinese
landing.feature_aiChat_desc: Trained on NZ regulations. Bilingual. Answers your tax, employment, and compliance questions.
landing.feature_calculator_desc: Hard-coded rules engine. Precise GST, PAYE, and KiwiSaver calculations — no AI guessing.
landing.feature_calendar_desc: Auto-generates GST return, PAYE filing, Annual Return deadlines with reminders.
landing.feature_gp_desc: Search for GPs who speak Mandarin or Cantonese. Filter by city, language, and availability.
landing.feature_flights_desc: Track Auckland-to-China flight prices and set price alerts for the best deals.
landing.feature_jobs_desc: Post and browse jobs in the Chinese community. Employers hire, job seekers find work.
landing.step_register_desc: Sign up with email or Google in 30 seconds.
landing.step_onboard_desc: Entity type, GST info, employee count — AI tailors its service to your situation.
landing.step_use_desc: AI chat, calculators, calendar, find GP, flight tracker — all free.
landing.trustSources: Data sources: Inland Revenue (IRD), Ministry of Business, Innovation & Employment (MBIE), Companies Office
landing.trustDisclaimer: Information provided is general only and does not constitute financial, legal, or tax advice. Consult IRD or a licensed professional.
landing.disclaimer: BizMate provides information only, not professional advice.

product.oneLiner: In one line: save people, time, and money for owners; make life in NZ easier for Chinese users.

audiences.primary: Primary: NZ Chinese SME owners (revenue < NZD 10M)
audiences.secondary: Secondary: job seekers, students, new migrants
audiences.quaternary: Quaternary: accountants and bookkeepers (as a tool)

painBusiness.title: Business pain points (paid tier)
painBusiness.p1: Owners wear every hat — labour is costly ($23.15/hr + KiwiSaver + ACC), so owners cover accounting, HR, marketing, support, and IT
painBusiness.p2: Hiring and people management are hard — skill shortages, tighter visas, strong employee protections, complex exits
painBusiness.p3: Marketing and growth are weak — Google Ads/SEO/social are hard; agencies are expensive; bilingual content is difficult
painBusiness.p4: Cash flow is existential — long receivables, seasonality, weak forecasting
painBusiness.p5: Tax compliance is complex — GST/PAYE/provisional deadlines are easy to miss
painBusiness.p6: Employment law is unfamiliar — Holidays Act, KiwiSaver duties, personal grievance risk
painBusiness.p7: Isolation in decisions — weak peer networks, unclear benchmarks, language barriers

painLife.title: Life pain points (free tier)
painLife.p8: Finding a Chinese-speaking GP — who speaks Mandarin and accepts new patients
painLife.p9: Pricey return flights — when to buy
painLife.p10: Fragmented job info — scattered across WeChat groups, forums, Seek
painLife.p11: Opaque import costs — end-to-end landed cost from China is unclear
painLife.p12: Scattered tutoring info — no single hub for Chinese community education

mvp.title: MVP (Phase 1) core features
mvp.aiChat: AI chat: bilingual Q&A on NZ rules with RAG; citations and disclaimer on every answer
mvp.taxCalc: NZ tax calculators: GST, PAYE, KiwiSaver — deterministic rules, not LLM guesses
mvp.complianceCal: Compliance calendar from GST cycle and balance date; email reminders (Pro)
mvp.findGp: Find a GP: Healthpoint data; filter by distance, language, accepting patients
mvp.userSystem: Accounts: email + Google sign-in; company onboarding
mvp.landing: Landing: bilingual marketing and pricing pages
mvp.stripeNote: Subscriptions & Stripe: free for the first 6 months; payment deferred

architecture.layer1Body: GST, PAYE, KiwiSaver, ACC, Holidays Act, minimum wage, compliance dates — all deterministic code.
architecture.layer2Body: Each item has source URL, effective date, applicability, last verified; IRD and official sources.
architecture.layer3Body: Xero/MYOB, Healthpoint, Skyscanner, Companies Office, etc. (phased).

compliance.disclaimerBody: Information only — not legal, tax, or accounting advice.
compliance.privacy: NZ Privacy Act 2020; users may request deletion.
compliance.dataResidency: Data hosted in AU/NZ (e.g. Supabase Sydney).

pricing.title: Pricing (reference)
pricing.free: Free: $0 — limited AI, calculators, GP finder, flight alerts, jobs
pricing.pro: Pro: $49/mo — unlimited AI, compliance calendar, docs, integrations, job posts, marketing assistant
pricing.enterprise: Enterprise: $149/mo — Pro plus multi-entity, document review, accountant workflows, industry packs

auth.checkEmail: Check your email and confirm the link if verification is enabled.
auth.errorGeneric: Something went wrong. Please try again.
auth.passwordMin: Password must be at least 8 characters

calculators.title: Tax calculators
calculators.disclaimer: Illustrative only — not tax advice. Confirm with IRD or an accountant.

calendar.heading: Compliance calendar
calendar.subtitle: GST, PAYE filing, provisional tax, and other illustrative deadlines. Confirm dates with IRD and Companies Office.

chat.heading: AI assistant
chat.subtitle: Ask about NZ tax, employment, and compliance. Replies stream in real time; tools run for calculations.
chat.inputPlaceholder: Ask a question… (Enter to send, Shift+Enter for new line)
chat.disclaimerBody: BizMate provides general information only. It is not financial, legal, or tax advice. Confirm important matters with IRD, MBIE, or a qualified professional.
chat.suggestion1: How do I register for GST?
chat.suggestion2: PAYE 和 KiwiSaver 雇主需要做什么？
chat.suggestion3: What are provisional tax due dates for a March balance date?

gp.heading: Find a GP
gp.subtitle: Filter by city, spoken language, and whether the practice is accepting new patients. Information is illustrative — confirm with the clinic or Healthpoint.
gp.searchError: Search failed. Please try again later.

flights.heading: Flight Price Monitor
flights.subtitle: Track flight prices from Auckland to China. Set price alerts so you never miss a deal.

wechat.heading: Follow BizMate on WeChat
wechat.subtitle: Get the latest NZ business news, tax reminders, and flight deal alerts.
wechat.feature_news_desc: Tax policy updates, regulation changes, and business opportunities for NZ Chinese owners.
wechat.feature_tax_desc: GST returns, PAYE filing, Annual Return — timely reminders before each due date.
wechat.feature_flights_desc: Instant notifications for discounted flights to China. Never miss a good price.
wechat.feature_community_desc: Local Chinese business events, community gatherings, and networking opportunities.
wechat.orWeb: Or register to use the web version directly
